news_title: Siyata Mobile Announces Closing of Merger with Core Gaming
summary: Siyata Mobile (NASDAQ:CHAI)closed its merger with Core Gaming onOctober 3, 2025, and the combined company was renamedCore AI Holdings, Inc.The deal issued67,302,300 common sharesto Core Gaming shareholders based on a $160,000,000 exchange ratio tied to the 10‑day VWAP. Core Gaming reportedFY2024 revenue of $79 millionand >780 million lifetime downloads. A1-for-4 reverse stock splitbecomes effectiveOct 7, 2025, reducing outstanding shares from 79,689,523 to 19,922,381. Post-split shares will trade on Nasdaq asCHAIwith new CUSIP 83013Q871.
